name: tkenhanced

metadata.name: TkEnhanced
metadata.summary: Enhanced Tkinter widgets for a modern look and additional functionality.

documentation: This package includes enhanced widgets for Tkinter with a modern appearance and additional features. It aims to improve the aesthetics and functionality of Tkinter applications.

methods.name: TkEnhanced.components.enhanced_image.EnhancedImage.__init__
documentation:
Valid option names:
activebackground, anchor, background, borderwidth, cursor, filter, height, highlightbackground,
highlightcolor, highlightthickness, image, justify, padx, pady, relief, resizemode, state, width.
